use_cases.name: WasmPad Playground
use_cases.description: Browser-based code playground where users write Rust, Go, or JS, compile to WebAssembly, and deploy as serverless functions. Per-user K8s namespace provisioning with resource quotas. Live execution output, performance metrics, and shareable function URLs.

design.vibe: Dark developer IDE aesthetic with purple and cyan accents

use_cases.name: RunBox Sandbox
use_cases.description: Multi-language code execution platform running snippets inside gVisor-sandboxed containers or WASM runtimes. Submit code, get output with resource usage and timing. For coding interviews, education, and API-accessible execution-as-a-service.

design.vibe: Dark terminal theme with red accent, hacker aesthetic

use_cases.name: DevDock Portal
use_cases.description: Self-service developer portal for requesting K8s namespaces, virtual clusters, and WASM execution environments. Platform team sets quotas and policies. Browser-based terminal access, environment templates, and team management.

design.vibe: Clean enterprise portal with blue primary and purple accents

use_cases.name: WasmAPI Builder
use_cases.description: Visual drag-and-drop API builder where users define endpoints and write handler logic that compiles to WebAssembly. Built-in API gateway, rate limiting, monitoring dashboard. Each project gets its own K8s namespace with auto-scaling.

design.vibe: Dark with orange and cyan, modern API developer tool

use_cases.name: VaultRun Confidential
use_cases.description: Sensitive data processing platform where WASM modules run inside hardware TEEs for confidential computing. Upload modules, view attestation reports, execution logs, and audit trails. For healthcare, finance, and regulated workloads.

design.vibe: Dark secure vault aesthetic with green trust indicators

use_cases.name: HyperDeploy PaaS
use_cases.description: Platform-as-a-Service that auto-detects whether to deploy code as a container or WASM module. Git-push deploys, staging environments, custom domains. WASM deploys get sub-millisecond cold starts. Full pipeline management UI.

design.vibe: Dark gradient with purple-pink, modern PaaS aesthetic

use_cases.name: LabCloud Academy
use_cases.description: Educational platform where students get isolated K8s namespaces with pre-configured lab environments. Sandboxed browser terminals, WASM-powered client-side code execution for instant feedback. Instructor dashboard manages courses and grading.

design.vibe: Light academic theme with sky blue and amber accents

use_cases.name: RuntimeBench Compare
use_cases.description: Upload workloads and benchmark them across container, WASM, gVisor, and Kata runtimes side-by-side. Performance comparison dashboard: cold start latency, memory usage, throughput, CPU overhead. Architecture decision-making tool.

design.vibe: Dark analytics dashboard with blue charts and red highlights

use_cases.name: EdgeSim Network
use_cases.description: Simulate edge computing scenarios by deploying WASM functions to simulated edge nodes (K8s pods with resource constraints). Latency maps, function routing visualization, failover behavior testing. Test edge architectures before real deployment.

design.vibe: Dark network topology theme with cyan nodes and green connections

use_cases.name: ServiceForge Studio
use_cases.description: Web wizard to define microservices (REST, gRPC, event-driven). Generates code, compiles to WASM or container images, provisions K8s namespace with service mesh, deploys everything. Live architecture diagram and health dashboard.

design.vibe: Deep indigo with soft purple and orange, forge/workshop aesthetic

use_cases.name: AgentBox Sandbox
use_cases.description: Deploy AI agents in isolated sandbox environments with strict resource limits. Upload agent code, configure tool access (filesystem, network, APIs), monitor execution in real-time. WASM option for lightweight agents. Per-agent K8s namespaces.

design.vibe: Dark AI theme with amber warning colors and purple neural network accents

use_cases.name: HookEngine Webhooks
use_cases.description: Register webhook endpoints and write processing logic that compiles to WASM. Incoming webhooks trigger WASM function execution with scale-to-zero when idle. Event logs, failure rates, retry queues, and per-tenant namespace isolation.

design.vibe: Dark webhook flow theme with red triggers and green success indicators

use_cases.name: ToolSmith Builder
use_cases.description: Low-code platform where teams build internal tools (dashboards, forms, CRUD apps). Backend logic runs as WASM functions for security and portability. Per-team K8s namespaces with built-in auth, DB connectors, and API integrations.

design.vibe: Light clean builder interface with purple primary and teal tools

use_cases.name: ComplianceBox Scanner
use_cases.description: Upload container images or WASM modules. Platform runs them in multiple sandbox configurations (gVisor, Kata, native) and reports security posture: syscall usage, network access patterns, file access. Compliance scorecards and policy enforcement.

design.vibe: Light compliance green with red alert indicators, trust-focused

use_cases.name: WasmStore Marketplace
use_cases.description: App store for WebAssembly applications. Developers publish WASM modules with metadata, users deploy with one click to their allocated K8s namespace. Per-user isolation, ratings, usage metrics, and billing integration.

design.vibe: Light marketplace feel with blue trust and orange action buttons
